title: Ubiquiti G6 Bullet, UniFi Protect camera, 8MP, black
category: Ubiquiti / Cameras, security / IP cameras / Bullet
description: The UniFi G6 Bullet camera features a high-resolution 8MP sensor (3840 x 2160 @ 30 FPS) and a fixed lens with a 109.9° field of view. Equipped with infrared LEDs, it enables night vision up to 30 meters. It also includes a built-in microphone for audio recording and a 10/100 Mbps LAN port with PoE support. Thanks to the adjustable mount, the camera can be positioned across all 3 axes. The device is enclosed in an IP66-rated weatherproof housing, making it ideal for outdoor use The camera is powered via a PoE adapter or switch supporting 802.3af or passive PoE (36â57V DC). Maximum power consumption is 9.9W Thanks to built-in AI capabilities, the camera supports advanced features like facial recognition, license plate detection, and smart object classification (person, vehicle, animal) 8MP resolution at 30 FPS AI-powered smart detections Infrared night vision (up to 30 m) IP66 weather-resistant housing Built-in microphone Managed via UniFi Protect software Vandal-resistant rating: IK04 Camera unit Screws and wall plugs Wall mounting bracket Metal mounting clip
